metadata.purpose: Compact actionable queue for reproducible question-bank quality follow-up; not a full-bank semantic review manifest.
metadata.generation_rule: Includes confirmed structural blockers/duplicates/contradictions when present, plus answer-length-cue cases selected by the deterministic rule embedded in each item. Current structural validation found no blockers, duplicate IDs, or duplicate normalized stems.

evidence.rule: correct option is the longest option AND length(correct) / median(length(distractors)) >= 2.75 AND length(correct) - max(length(distractors)) >= 45 characters; queue capped at 50 highest ratio/delta cases

items.recommended_next_action: Review with source material or SME; if the keyed answer is visibly cued by length, rewrite distractors or shorten the keyed answer without changing meaning.
